title: Envoy HTTP/2 RST_STREAM and Protocol Errors
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="envoy:access"
| regex _raw="(?i)(RST_STREAM|GOAWAY|protocol_error)"
| bin _time span=5m
| stats count by cluster_name, _time
| where count > 15
description: Protocol errors masquerade as application timeouts.
implementation: Align `http2` settings with language runtimes; log `%RESPONSE_CODE_DETAILS%`.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We debug HTTP/2 issues between services.
